name: node-convert-source-map
title: node-convert-source-map
summary: Converts a source-map from/to between formats
description:
Converts a source-map from/to between formats
Converts a source-map from/to different formats and allows adding/changing
the properties.
.
Source maps allow tools to display unminified code from minified code
with an optimized mapping between them. It is a kind of debug symbols
for minified javascript.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-convert-source-map because Converts a source-map from/to between formats.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-convert-source-map as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-convert-source-map with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-convert-source-map --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
